E-01.evidence: npx size-limit --json: @tomis/grid-pro-agg size=58875 (58.8 KB brotli) vs sizeLimit=20000. FAIL. However, this is a pre-existing monorepo infrastructure issue: (1) multiple other packages also fail (grid-core 68KB/30KB, grid-export 283KB/20KB, grid-pro-range 24KB/20KB, grid-pro-merging 21KB/20KB); (2) the .size-limit.json entry for grid-pro-agg lacks an 'ignore' array for peerDeps (React, TanStack Table, react-virtual), causing bundler to include them in size measurement; (3) raw build output is 9.86 KB — G-003 adds <1 KB of pure registry code. The 58.8 KB measurement inflates peerDep bundle. G-002 implement-score.json also marked E-01 YES with 9.3 KB raw estimate. Pre-existing infra defect not caused by G-003.

E-01 size-limit infra note: pre-existing .size-limit.json defect — grid-pro-agg entry lacks 'ignore' array for peerDeps (React, TanStack Table, react-virtual), unlike grid-features and grid-pro-tracking entries which correctly exclude their peerDeps. Fixing this would require modifying .size-limit.json (not in G-003 spec Section 7 implementFiles — out of scope per C-1 surgical change principle). Recommend follow-up infra goal to add 'ignore' array matching grid-pro-tracking pattern.
